target.title: feat(plugins): enrich before_dispatch hook event with message and media metadata
target.body:
## Summary

Describe the problem and fix in 2–5 bullets:

- **Problem**: Inbound channel messages containing file attachments could not be efficiently processed by direct-routing plugins during the `before_dispatch` hook phase because the hook event payload was limited to basic message content, missing conversation context and staged media metadata.
- **Why it matters**: Direct-routing plugins need to intercept turns immediately during `before_dispatch` to handle media attachments, preventing unnecessary LLM token consumption and latency. Additionally, documentation incorrectly described `before_dispatch` as an outbound hook.
- **What changed**:
  - Enriched `PluginHookBeforeDispatchEvent` in `src/plugins/hook-types.ts` with `accountId`, `conversationId`, `threadId`, `messageId`, and staged media metadata arrays (`mediaPath`, `mediaPaths`, `mediaUrl`, `mediaUrls`, `mediaType`, `mediaTypes`, `metadata`).
  - Propagated all these context and media fields during `runBeforeDispatch` hook execution in `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts`.
  - Updated tests in `src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts` to fully assert and expect these enriched properties.
  - Corrected the `before_dispatch` description in `docs/plugins/hooks.md` from "outbound" to "inbound channel message inspect before agent dispatch".
- **What did NOT change (scope boundary)**: The core model reply-dispatch lifecycle remains untouched; this strictly enriches the payload delivered to hook runners.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [x] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [x] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes # None
- Related # None
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: Passing full inbound message context and media assets to the `before_dispatch` hooks so plugins can intercept turns without needing a downstream model call.
- **Real environment tested**: macOS with Node 22 running the OpenClaw Gateway.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  ```bash
  pnpm openclaw gateway start
target.author: 3kittens-ai
